Dear David and Jane,

We are pleased to advise that your joint application for a Personal Loan with AussieLoanAI has been approved. Congratulations!

Loan Details:

  Primary Borrower:        David Nguyen
  Co-Borrower:             Jane Nguyen
  Loan Amount:             $45,000.00
  Interest Rate:           7.25% p.a. (Fixed)
  Comparison Rate:         7.48% p.a.*
  Loan Term:               60 months (5 years)
  Monthly Repayment:       $897.00
  Establishment Fee:       $400.00
  First Repayment Date:    18 May 2026

Next Steps:

Please review the attached loan agreement. Both borrowers must sign. To proceed:

  1. Each borrower signs and returns their documents by 2 May 2026.
  2. Confirm your nominated joint bank account.
  3. Funds are typically in your account within 1–2 business days after all signatures.

Before You Sign:

Take the time to read the full terms carefully, including how joint liability works.

If either of your circumstances has changed, please let us know. You are welcome to seek independent advice.

You will have access to a cooling-off period after signing.

We're Here For You:

If you experience financial difficulty, contact our Financial Hardship team on 1300 000 001 or aussieloanai@gmail.com.

Contact me at 1300 000 000 (Mon–Fri, 8:30am – 5:30pm AEST) or reply to this email.

Congratulations again, David and Jane. Thanks for choosing us at AussieLoanAI.

Kind regards,

Sarah Mitchell
Senior Lending Officer
AussieLoanAI Pty Ltd

─────────────────────────────────────
*Comparison rate of 7.48% p.a. applies only to the example given. Different amounts and terms will result in different comparison rates.

If unresolved, contact the Australian Financial Complaints Authority (AFCA) on 1800 931 678 or at www.afca.org.au.
